props.name: multiple

props.description: CSS class prefix for BEM namespace customization

props.name: status

props.name: success
props.description: Whether the field is in a success state

props.name: contentWidth
props.description: Custom width for the calendar content area

props.description: Ref to the root wrapper element

props.description: Placement of the label relative to the checkbox ('left' places label before checkbox, 'right' places label after)

props.description: Whether to show the dismiss (close) button

props.description: Placement of the beak arrow relative to target element

props.name: arrowOffset
props.description: Offset of the arrow from center (CSS value, e.g.

props.name: value
props.description: The text content to copy to clipboard

props.name: successColor
props.description: Icon color when copy succeeds (default: semantic positive color)

props.description: Whether to show the background container around the icon (default: true)

props.name: orientation
props.description: Position of the title inside the divider

props.name: orientationMargin
props.description: Margin between the title and the closest border (px or percentage)

props.description: Whether the divider text is displayed in plain style (no bold/special styling)

props.name: children
props.description: Inner content rendered between the divider lines

props.name: open
props.description: Controls the open state of the drawer

props.name: placement
props.description: Position where the drawer slides out from

props.name: width
props.description: Width of the drawer when placement is 'left' or 'right'

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the drawer when placement is 'top' or 'bottom'

props.name: title
props.description: Title content displayed in the drawer header

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer content displayed at the bottom of the drawer

props.name: maskClosable
props.description: Whether clicking the mask can close the drawer

props.name: showCloseIcon
props.description: Whether to show the close icon in the header

props.name: showBackIcon
props.description: Whether to show the back icon in the header

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback function triggered when the drawer is closed

props.name: onBack
props.description: Callback function triggered when the back icon is clicked

props.description: Custom styles for the root container

props.description: Custom styles for the drawer wrapper

props.description: Custom styles for the body section

props.description: Custom styles for the footer section

props.name: mask
props.description: When provided, Input behaves as a mask input.

props.name: slotChar
props.description: Placeholder character for unfilled mask positions

props.name: unmask
props.description: When true, onChange returns the raw value without mask characters

props.name: autoClear
props.description: When true, clears incomplete mask input on blur

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Callback when all mask positions are filled

props.name: items
props.description: Navigation items — top-level items with children render as groups

props.name: header
props.description: Header content — defaults to built-in 1Money logo; pass null to hide

props.name: onLogoClick
props.description: Click handler for the default logo

props.name: children
props.description: Children rendered at bottom (e.g., settings, profile)

props.description: Class name applied to the Popconfirm card.

props.name: prefixCls
props.description: Class name prefix used to generate internal BEM-style classes.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading displayed at the top of the floating card.

props.name: body
props.description: Secondary description displayed below the title.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon shown alongside the title and body content.

props.name: showIcon
props.description: Whether to render the leading icon.

props.name: showArrow
props.description: Whether to render the custom beak arrow.

props.name: cancelButtonProps
props.description: Additional props merged onto the secondary action button.

props.name: confirmButtonProps
props.description: Additional props merged onto the primary action button.

props.name: closeOnCancel
props.description: Whether the panel should close automatically after the secondary action.

props.name: closeOnConfirm
props.description: Whether the panel should close automatically after the primary action.

props.name: onCancel
props.description: Called when the secondary action is pressed.

props.name: onConfirm
props.description: Called when the primary action is pressed.
